sign_in.title: Log in
sign_in.subtitle: Enter your email and password to access your account.
sign_in.local_mail_notice: You are running the local mail adapter.

sign_up.title: Create your account
sign_up.subtitle: Start your Storyarn workspace — no invitation required.
sign_up.invited_subtitle: Set your password to access the workspace you were invited to.

confirm_access.title: Confirm access
confirm_access.subtitle: This is a protected area. Please enter your password to continue.

errors.invalid_password: The password you entered is incorrect.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a minute.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Refresh the page and log in again.

reset_request.title: Reset your password
reset_request.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a secure password reset link.
reset_request.sent_description: If that email belongs to an account, password reset instructions will arrive shortly.

reset_password.title: Choose a new password
reset_password.subtitle: Use a strong password that you don't use anywhere else.
reset_password.complete_description: Your password has been changed. You can now log in with the new password.
